zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston於1443年出生在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓時，他的父親Ralph Shirley33歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington21歲。他於1504年與Jane Bellingham在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1510年在英國英格蘭史洛普爾希斯享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素可維斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Shirley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places so named, such as Shirley (Warwickshire), Shirley in Millbrook (Hampshire), Shirley (Surrey), Shirley in Owston (Yorkshire), and Shirley (Derbyshire). The placenames probably derive from Old English scīr ‘bright’ + lēah ‘woodland clearing’, though some may have scīr ‘district, shire’ as the initial element if they lie on a boundary; for example, the Warwickshire place lies on the Warwickshire-Worcestershire boundary. The name Shirley first appears in Ireland in the late 17th century, following the granting of lands to a Shirley family in the barony of Farney, Monaghan.

History: William Shirley (1694–1771) was born in Sussex, England, and came to MA in 1731. He rose in the colonial service, was appointed governor in 1741, and was responsible for the British capture of the French fortress of Louisbourg, Cape Breton Island, in 1745.

variants.name: Sherley
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Shirley  .
Americanized form of Norwegian Sjøli or Sjølie: habitational name from a farmstead named with sjø ‘sea, lake’ + li ‘hillside’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston was born in 1443, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom, his father, Ralph Shirley, was 33 and his mother, Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington, was 21. He married Jane Bellingham in 1504, in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. He died in 1510, in Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67, and was buried in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston est né en 1443, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Shirley, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Jane Bellingham en 1504, à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé en 1510, à Heath, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterré à Wiston, Sussex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Er hat 1504 in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom Jane Bellingham geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb 1510 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Heath, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Wiston, Sussex, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ko.West Grinstead, West Sussex, England, Un: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 수세스 웨스트 그린스테아드
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston(이)가 1443년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Shirley(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1504년 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에서 Jane Bellingham(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1510년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 히스에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수세스 와이스턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Ralph Shirley Lord of Wiston родился в 1443 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Ralph Shirley было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Blount Baroness Eatington, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Bellingham в 1504 г. в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер в 1510 г. в местности хит, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет и был похоронен в местности вистон, суссекс, Англия, Великобритания.
